hero.label: Data & AI Engineer
hero.tagline: Based in Lyon, available across France and Switzerland.
typewriter: I turn raw data into decisions.
I engineer AI pipelines at scale.

about.title: About me
bio: An EPITA graduate engineer, I am above all someone who likes to understand things deeply and do them well, whether in code, in a team project, or in a new idea that keeps me busy on weekends.

I am the kind of person who sets challenges for himself: top of my class, French swimming championships, personal projects started out of pure curiosity. Not for performance alone, but because I get bored quickly when I stop improving.
I had the opportunity to study in Ireland, which taught me to work in varied contexts and adapt quickly. It was, of course, there that I was able to perfect my English and discover other cultures.
What people usually remember about me: I am proactive, committed, persistent, and I deliver. I am looking for a team where these qualities matter as much as technical skills.
